project_name: Familia Reyes-Montoya — standalone_residential — Cerritos, Baja California Sur
raw_message: Hola, tenemos un terreno en Cerritos, BCS — frente al Pacífico, en el borde entre la vegetación de playa y la arena. Queremos construir una casa que viva de cara al horizonte. El sitio es de aprox. 3,000m². Estamos interesados en trabajar con un equipo que entienda el lugar antes de trazar una línea.
initial_assessment: Standalone residential project on a 3,000sqm coastal Pacific-facing plot in Cerritos, BCS — flat to gently sloping at the scrub-to-sand transition. Program: 320sqm residence (master suite, 2 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms, living/dining, kitchen, studio, covered terrace, pool deck, pool, solar, landscape and interior coordination). Budget signal: $600K–$900K USD — realistic for coastal residential at this scope. Design engagement is strong: client explicitly frames the horizon as a lived spatial condition rather than a view, and requests a team that understands the place before drawing a line.
